notes: Critical undefined constants (BOMB_MAX, BOMB_W, BOMB_H, BOMB_SPEED) cause ReferenceErrors on alien fire, missing togglePause function, and structural brace errors make the game crash and unplayable.
Game crashes 1.6 seconds after starting due to undefined bomb constants (BOMB_MAX, BOMB_W, etc.), and pressing 'p' crashes due to an undefined togglePause function.

The build has a critical JavaScript syntax/scoping issue around duplicated declarations and malformed bomb-collision logic that likely prevents normal execution, so despite recognizable Space Invaders intentions it is largely nonfunctional.
